calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER TRACY DELUCA's Notice Of Hearing

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Tracy Lynn Deluca's petition for declaratory judgment pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1060 is granted. The Court finds that any discrepancies and inconsistencies in the records attached by petitioner are due to clerical errors and/or lack of knowledge of the informants and/or the personal choice of the individuals cited within the attached records to assume names different than that on their birth certificates.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/SRB)
